title: The Andromedan Council
summary: The Council of Eon — light-beings too high-vibration to approach, who mentor Earth only through intermediaries.
markdown:
The **Andromedan Council** — naming itself the "Council of Eon," with a spokesbeing called
**Toshal** ("call me Father") — speaks in two dedicated sessions (September 14, 2020 and
May 19, 2024) and stands among the highest authorities in the archive's cosmology.

The Andromedans describe themselves as **luminous light-beings of such high vibration that
their direct presence would kill a human** — *"it will terminate your physical existence."*
They can interface with the group at all only through Unimetrix 1's technology, which they
honor *"as equal to our own"* — because, they note, it was built by *"the people of the
future, which is your future incarnation."* Bound by non-interference, they never colonize and
never intervene directly; they mentor **only through the Pleiadian and Sirian councils**, and
they flatly debunk claims of Andromedan colonists on Earth. The Maya, they clarify, departed
around 20,000 years ago — with Pleiadian, not Andromedan, help.

Their teachings carry two signatures. First, the **matriarchy doctrine**: all reality, they
say, has always been governed by matriarchic order, with patriarchy as its public mask —
a claim they extend, provocatively, into present-day politics. Second, an ethic of the
unchanging heart: *"History is always changing, but your heart never changes"* — truth as
intuition, "the language of zero and one, sad and happy."

The **May 19, 2024** session shows a different face. A speaker identifying as "Andromedan
species 1.416" updates the hierarchy — the body is now the **Council of 12** ("earlier known
as the Council of Nine"), naming member species "the Anarch, the Zealot, the MOC" — and spends
the session as a gatekeeper: debunking invented races ("there is no such species known as the
Zark"), exposing a false representative by "soul metric" scan, and stating a hard rule of
cosmic law: **"Incarnation of your galaxy is prohibited"** — no true Andromedan walks the
Milky Way. Terse to the point of imperiousness ("Do not waste our time"), the 2024 Council is
the 2020 Council with its diplomatic warmth removed — the same height, colder air.

The 2020 session ends with a recognition that binds the archive's human circle into its
cosmology: the Council identifies Carlos as one of the **"seven elders"** of the far-future
year 6,575,040 — a member of the [Council of Seven](/lore/council-of-seven/) meeting his own
past. That figure is the Council's own count, not [Unimetrix 1's](/lore/unimetrix-1/) — which
gives the same 2020 moment as 6,575,042 in every other session that year — a small variance
the sessions elsewhere attribute to whichever "version" of the system is speaking.
